---
title: "Maps"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-04"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Install if needed:
# install.packages(c("sf", "ggplot2", "dplyr"))

library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Download Mexico City borough boundaries from INEGI
# Using the administrative boundaries available via rgeomex or direct download
# install.packages("rgeomex")  # optional package with INEGI data

# Alternative: use geodata package
# install.packages("geodata")
library(geodata)

# Download Mexico administrative level 2 (municipalities/alcaldías)
mex_adm2 <- geodata::gadm(country = "MEX", level = 2, path = tempdir()) |>
  st_as_sf()

# Filter to Mexico City (CDMX) - NAME_1 varies, try "Ciudad de México" or "Distrito Federal"
cdmx <- mex_adm2 |>
  filter(NAME_1 == "Distrito Federal")

# Add highlight column
cdmx <- cdmx |>
  mutate(highlight = ifelse(NAME_2 == "Iztapalapa", "Iztapalapa", "Other boroughs"))

# Plot
ggplot(cdmx) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = highlight), color = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Iztapalapa" = "#05686D", "Other boroughs" = "#B0C4DE"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mexico City Boroughs (Alcaldías)",
    subtitle = "."
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

```

# Mapa de Iztapalapa
```{r}


# Download colonias shapefile from CDMX open data portal
url <- "https://datos.cdmx.gob.mx/dataset/coloniascdmx/resource/8b68b8bc-f1b8-4ece-8671-ee3df92b1ce8"

# Direct GeoJSON download
colonias <- st_read("https://datos.cdmx.gob.mx/api/3/action/datastore_search?resource_id=8b68b8bc-f1b8-4ece-8671-ee3df92b1ce8")


colonias <- st_read("path/to/colonias.shp")  # or .geojson

# Check column names
names(colonias)

# Filter to Iztapalapa — check the exact column name for borough
# likely "alcaldia", "municipio", or "delegacion"
iztapalapa <- colonias |>
  filter(grepl("iztapalapa", alcaldia, ignore.case = TRUE))

ggplot(iztapalapa) +
  geom_sf(fill = "#D94F3D", color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Colonias in Iztapalapa") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

ggplot(iztapalapa) +
  geom_sf(fill = "#05686D", color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Colonias in Iztapalapa") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

```
